name: Find a Camp Directory
eligibility_summary: Directory of camps/programs; eligibility varies by listing.
evidence_summary: Large directory of camp/program profiles commonly including program type (e.g., overnight vs day) and other attributes, useful for bulk discovery and later extraction into venue-level records.

notes: Discovery-first source; extract each listing’s official camp URL and promote only when overnight/residential evidence is explicit on official or strong secondary sources.
Prefer ACA listings as a lead surface, then validate on official camp pages.
